race.comment: SEQUISTA (8) will relish the fast tempo and ready to win. Away only fairly and savaged the line with a tidy second over 1300m at this track. Nock sticks and will prove hard to hold out. SWORD OF LEGACY (3) has made rapid improvement this time in and hard to stop this trainer and jockey combo. Back in class when a dominant winner over 1200m at Eagle Farm as a heavily backed fav. Rawiller retains the ride and has genuine top three claims. JELLICIOUS (5) mixing her distances this prep and can return today. Found the 1100m too sharp when fourth at this track in similar grade. Senior rider goes on and no excuses here. COUPLES RETREAT (4) held up in the straight and never got a clear crack at them when sixth over 1200m here. At her top for this and deserves another chance from the inside barrier. Can finish closer today. TEQUILA BABY (7) tongue-tie goes on, and her best form is over the 1200m. Can get cover from the draw with Zac Lloyd aboard.
